title: T5 Watchtower: app charter + scaffold — first deploy serving status.py --json
prompt: Turn Watchtower into a chartered, running web app per Q6 (real web app: kanban, live agent view, bus view, curation queue). Three deliverables: (a) write the charter doc docs/watchtower/charter-2026-07.md in dark-factory — the four views, the API seams (seam 1 = shell-out to engine/status.py --json, seam 2 = read-only engine/store reads, seam 3 = future Switchboard SSE, seam 4 = future needs-decision write-back), what it reads, read-only doctrine, non-goals, follow-on tickets — superseding the census-era v0 spec.md/plan.md; (b) finish (do NOT re-create) the existing AppyStack RVETS scaffold at ~/dev/ad/apps/watchtower (1 commit, 2026-06-11): npm install, move ports off Chrome-unsafe 5060/5061 to the registered 5080 (client) / 5081 (server) per ~/.config/appydave/apps.json, add GET /api/engine/status on the Express server that execFiles python3 <dark-factory>/engine/status.py --json and passes the JSON through verbatim, and replace the client demo page with a polling status view (halt/backoff banner, queue, running, recent done); (c) first deploy: boot npm run dev, prove /health + /api/engine/status + the client page + the Vite proxy path all live via curl, then kill it — leave nothing listening. Then register the app (fix apps.json's stale path/url, add locations.json entry key=watchtower jump=japp-watchtower, add the micro-apps line to ~/dev/ad/CLAUDE.md) and commit+push each touched repo scoped to its own files. Build ONLY the status slice — the four Q6 views are chartered here and built by T5-02/03/04. Read and execute the war game at backlog/wargames/T5-01-watchtower-charter-scaffold.md. Follow its moves in order; on any failure signal apply the counter-move; on any abort condition stop and write needs-decision/.
verify: docs/watchtower/charter-2026-07.md exists in dark-factory with kanban/curation/read-only/5080 all mentioned and >=8 sections, committed and pushed. In ~/dev/ad/apps/watchtower: npm run typecheck, npm test, and npm run build all exit 0; no 5060/5061 references remain outside package-lock.json; server/src/routes/engine.ts + engine.test.ts exist (test mocks the spawn so CI passes); after nohup npm run dev, curl http://localhost:5081/api/engine/status returns status ok with data.queue.depth present, http://localhost:5080/ serves the client and http://localhost:5080/api/engine/status proxies the same JSON — then the processes are killed and lsof shows nothing listening on 5080/5081. apps.json's watchtower path no longer points inside dark-factory and its url ends :5080; locations.json has exactly one key=watchtower entry; ~/dev/ad/CLAUDE.md mentions apps/watchtower. Watchtower repo tree clean and pushed. Negative: dark-factory engine/ and research/ untouched, no needs-decision park written on success, no claude -p/headless ever spawned, no process left running.
